parameters.name: OBJECT_NAMES_CASE_SENSITIVE
parameters.description: Determines whether the object names (tables, views, indexes, etc …) are case sensitive or not. Note: This parameter will not be able to be changed after sources have been added, unless all sources are removed.

parameters.name: BK_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Business Key columns of the HUB tables.

parameters.name: BK_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Business Key columns of the HUB tables.

parameters.name: CDC_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The name of the column used to store the date and time of the change detected in the source system.

parameters.name: CDC_FLAG
parameters.description: The name of the column/flag used to indicate the kind of change detected in the source system.

parameters.name: FK_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Foreign Key constraints of all generated tables.

parameters.name: FK_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Foreign Key constraints of all generated tables.

parameters.name: HUB_HASH_KEY_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Hash Key columns of the HUB tables.

parameters.name: HUB_HASH_KEY_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Hash Key columns of the HUB tables.

parameters.name: HUB_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the HUB tables.

parameters.name: HUB_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the HUB tables.

parameters.name: LDS_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Satellite on Object Based Link tables.

parameters.name: LND_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Object Based Link tables.

parameters.name: LND_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Object Based Link tables.

parameters.name: LNK_HASH_KEY_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Hash Key columns of the Link tables.

parameters.name: LNK_HASH_KEY_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Hash Key columns of the Link tables.

parameters.name: LNK_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Link tables.

parameters.name: LNK_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Link tables.

parameters.name: LKS_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Satellite on Link tables.

parameters.name: LOAD_CYCLE_ID
parameters.description: The name of the column used to hold the ID of the run.

parameters.name: LOAD_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The name of the column used to hold the load date of the records in the raw data vault.

parameters.name: LOAD_END_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The name of the column used to hold the load end date of the records in the satellites.

parameters.name: NHL_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Non Historical Link tables.

parameters.name: NHL_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Non Historical Link tables.

parameters.name: DDL_DROP
parameters.description: Indicates whether generated DDL will drop the tables before creating them. If set to N, no drop statements will be included in the generated DDL (which will result in errors when these tables already exist). Does not apply to BRIDGE or PIT objects.

parameters.name: PK_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Primary Key constraints of all generated tables.

parameters.name: PK_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Primary Key constraints of all generated tables.

parameters.name: SAT_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Satellite tables.

parameters.name: SAT_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Satellite tables.

parameters.name: HASHKEY_ESCAPE_CHARACTER
parameters.description: Determines the escape character used in the calculation of the hash key and hash difference. For Snowflake, Bigquery, Apache Spark and Singlestore the value \ will be automatically doubled while generating code

parameters.name: SRC_NAME_IN_BK
parameters.description: The name of the column that stores the source name in the HUB. Used in the calculation of the HUB hash key.

parameters.name: UK_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Unique Key constraints of all generated tables.

parameters.name: UK_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Unique Key constraints of all generated tables.

parameters.name: USE_SOURCE_UK_AS_BK
parameters.description: Indicates whether the system is allowed to use the unique keys of the source system as business keys.

parameters.name: DATA_QUALITY_BAD
parameters.description: Indicates whether the data quality of a source is bad. (If bad, then Y.) This can happen when columns contain data that may not correspond to the suggested data type for that attribute.

parameters.name: HASH_DIFF
parameters.description: The name of the column that stores the hash of all historic attributes in the SAT.

parameters.name: CDC_RELIABLE
parameters.description: Indicates whether CDC information (Insert, Delete and Update flags) is available and reliable. If set to N, more computationally expensive logic will be used.

parameters.name: INTRA_LOADCYCLE_CHANGES
parameters.description: Indicates whether all the changes during a loading cycle should be recorded. If set to N, only the last change during a loading cycle will be recorded and one timestamp will be used for the whole load cycle. If set to Y, the same timestamp will not be used for the whole load cycle.

parameters.name: HASHKEY_DELIMITER
parameters.description: Determines the character used as a delimiter between different business keys and attribute values of an object.

parameters.name: HASH_ALGORITHM
parameters.description: Determines the hash algorithm to use for the hash key and hashdiff fields. The "HASH" algorithm is only available for Snowflake,"SHA256" algorithm available for Snowflake, BigQuery, Azure Synapse and SQL Server.

parameters.name: DELETE_FLAG
parameters.description: The name of the column in the SATs used to indicate whether a record was deleted in the source system.

parameters.name: LKS_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Satellite on Link tables.

parameters.name: LDS_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Satellite on Object Based Link tables.

parameters.name: LND_HASH_KEY_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Hash Key columns of the Object Based Link tables.

parameters.name: LND_HASH_KEY_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Hash Key columns of the Object Based Link tables.

parameters.name: TEMP_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Temporary tables that are used for transformation logic.

parameters.name: TEMP_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Temporary tables that are used for transformation logic.

parameters.name: USE_CDC_TS_AS_LOAD_DATES
parameters.description: Use the cdc timestamp (aka transaction timestamp or modification date) for the load date and load end date, instead of a generated technical date. This parameter is not needed when insert only logic is used.

parameters.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_DELETE
parameters.description: Determines the value for the transaction type attribute to identify delete transaction types.

parameters.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_INSERT
parameters.description: Determines the value for the transaction type attribute to identify insert transaction types.

parameters.name: CURRENT_RECORD_LOAD_END_DATE
parameters.description: Determines the Load end date used for the current valid or active record(s). Format should be the same as the GENERAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT parameter.

parameters.name: DATA_QUALITY_BAD_COLUMN_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the attribute columns when the data quality is set to bad.

parameters.name: DATA_QUALITY_BAD_COLUMN_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the attribute columns when the data quality is set to bad.

parameters.name: SOURCE_IN_TEMP
parameters.description: The name of the column that holds the record source in the temp table (used for loading logic).

parameters.name: EQUAL_IN_TEMP
parameters.description: The name of the column used to store the EQUAL metadata attribute in the temp tables.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_EXT
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the Extraction tables.This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_STG
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the Staging layer.This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_FL
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the Raw Data Vault tables.This parameter supports templating, when creating a dv, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the dv name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_UPDATE
parameters.description: Determines the value for the transaction type attribute to identify update transaction types.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_CDC
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the incremental load tables.This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: PERSIST_DELTA_FIREWALL_VIEWS
parameters.description: Indicates whether a table should be created for the delta firewall.

parameters.name: REMOTE_JOURNALING_TABLES
parameters.description: Indicates whether CDC tables are not in the Data Warehouse, but on a remote database. The generated DDL only works if the database type of the source is one of the database types that are available as target.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_INI
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the initial load tables.This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_CDCR
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the incremental load tables on the source (only used when REMOTE_JOURNALING_TABLES is Y).This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_BV
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the Business Vault tables.This parameter supports templating, when creating a dv, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the dv name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: CDC_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: This parameter contains the prefix that will be added to the name of the source table when the CDC table name is different from the imported source tabel name

parameters.name: CDC_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: This parameter contains the suffix that will be added to the name of the source table when the CDC table name is different from the imported source tabel name

parameters.name: SCHEMA_PROCEDURES
parameters.description: The name of the schema for where all the procedures will be deployed.This parameter supports templating, when creating a project, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the project name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: COLUMN_LENGTH_MULTIPLIER
parameters.description: Determines the factor by which the length of the source system string attribute will be multiplied, to calculate the Raw Data Vault string attribute length.

parameters.name: TIME_ZONE_LOCAL
parameters.description: Indicates whether the project uses the same time zone for all of its timestamps. If set to N, will enable CDC_TIMESTAMP_WITH_TZ  and LOAD_TIMESTAMP_WITH_TZ.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_FMC
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the Flow Management Control layer.This parameter supports templating, when creating a project, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the project name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: ORACLE_12_1_OR_HIGHER
parameters.description: Indicates whether Oracle version is 12c Release 1 or higher. Since Oracle Database 12c Release 1 a different hashing algorithm has to be used. (Leave this on Y for other database types.)

parameters.name: EARLY_ARRIVING_FACTS
parameters.description: Indicates whether HUB business keys will be loaded from the parent object and all the related child objects. If set to N, business keys will be loaded ONLY from the parent object.

parameters.name: STORE_BK_FIELDS_IN_SAT
parameters.description: Indicates whether all the business keys should be stored as descriptive fields in the SAT.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_FL_MIGRATION
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the migration of Raw Data Vault tables. Old Data Vaults generated via FA3.0 use the schema specified here vs. the new one specified by SCHEMA_FL.This parameter supports templating, when creating a project, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the project name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: REMOTE_CDC_DBLINK_NAME
parameters.description: Determines the name for the database link used to connect to the remote CDC schema. Note: this is a name, not the link itself, to avoid exposing sensitive information.

parameters.name: NUMERIC_DECIMAL_CHARACTER_SOURCE
parameters.description: Determines the decimal character used in the source.

parameters.name: NUMERIC_DECIMAL_CHARACTER_TARGET
parameters.description: Determines the decimal character used in the target.

parameters.name: GENERATE_LOGGING
parameters.description: Indicates whether to generate logging for the cloud application. (Warning: this will slow everything down.)

parameters.name: SOURCE_RECORD_TYPE
parameters.description: Determines the value for the RECORD_TYPE attribute to identify source records.

parameters.name: RECORD_TYPE
parameters.description: The name of the column which contains the record type.

parameters.name: NULL_RECORD_TYPE
parameters.description: Determines the value for the RECORD_TYPE attribute to identify the null record.

parameters.name: EMPTYSTRING_IS_NULL
parameters.description: Determines whether an empty string is the same as NULL (not for ORACLE).

parameters.name: BK_CASE_INSENSITIVE_COMPARISON
parameters.description: Indicates whether all business key attributes for a HUB are converted to uppercase before hash difference calculation. This can eliminate case-related problems in key attributes. If set to N, all attributes are kept in the exact case as the source system.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_MTD
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the metadata tables.This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: LOAD_CYCLE_INFO_TABLE_NAME
parameters.description: The name of the table containing information about the load cycle.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_DTVR
parameters.description: The name of the remote schema for the Delta Layer (only used when REMOTE_JOURNALING_TABLES is Y).This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_MTDR
parameters.description: The name of the remote schema for the metadata tables (only used when REMOTE_JOURNALING_TABLES is Y).This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_DFV
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the Delta Firewall Layer.This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_DTV
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the Delta Layer.This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: DFV_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix for the delta firewall view.

parameters.name: DFV_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the delta firewall view.

parameters.name: MTD_EXCEPTION_RECORDS_TABLE_NAME
parameters.description: The name of the table containing the exception records.

parameters.name: UNKNOWN_RECORD_TYPE
parameters.description: Determines the value for the RECORD_TYPE attribute to identify unknown records.

parameters.name: ATTR_CASE_INSENSITIVE_COMPARISON
parameters.description: Indicates whether all attributes inside a SAT are converted to uppercase before hash difference calculation. This can eliminate case-related problems when determining whether record values have changed.

parameters.name: INSERT_ONLY_LOGIC
parameters.description: Indicates whether to implement insert only logic as defined by Data Vault 2.0 logic.

parameters.name: ADD_SOURCE_VIEWS
parameters.description: Indicates whether views are loaded from the source, along with the tables.

parameters.name: LOAD_TIMESTAMP_WITH_TZ
parameters.description: Indicates whether timestamps with timezone are used for load timestamps.

parameters.name: CDC_TIMESTAMP_WITH_TZ
parameters.description: Indicates whether timestamps with timezone are used for CDC timestamps.

parameters.name: CHECK_PARAMETER_NAMES
parameters.description: Indicates whether parameters should be checked for naming conflicts. Setting this parameter to N may improve the loading time of the parameter screens, but might cause errors later on, if some object and attribute names are not unique.

parameters.name: FMC_LOADING_WINDOW_TABLE_NAME
parameters.description: The name of the table containing the loading window dates.

parameters.name: LENGTH_ABBREVIATED_NAMES
parameters.description: Determines the maximum length of the abbreviated names of source objects and attributes. (If ORACLE_12_2_OR_HIGHER is N, the maximum length is capped at 14.)

parameters.name: LENGTH_SHORT_NAMES
parameters.description: Determines the maximum length for the short names of source objects and attributes. (If ORACLE_12_2_OR_HIGHER is N then the maximum length is capped at 4.)

parameters.name: POSTGRES_9_OR_HIGHER
parameters.description: Indicates whether PostgreSQL version is 9 or higher.

parameters.name: REF_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Reference tables.

parameters.name: REF_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Reference tables.

parameters.name: ORACLE_12_2_OR_HIGHER
parameters.description: Indicates whether Oracle version is 12c Release 2 or higher. When working with older versions of Oracle, the object and attribute names have to be limited in length. (Leave this on Y for other database types.)

parameters.name: FMC_BEGIN_LW_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The name of the column used to store the begin loading window timestamp for the FMC.

parameters.name: FMC_END_LW_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The name of the column used to store the end loading window timestamp for the FMC.

parameters.name: CLOSE_DELETED_RECORDS
parameters.description: If a record gets deleted, set the end date to the cdc timestamp of the delete instead of the CURRENT_RECORD_LOAD_END_DATE. Warning, this means that when a deleted record is added again, the history wont be accurate (there will be a gap in the history between the delete and the insert). This parameter has no effect when INSERT_ONLY_LOGIC = Y or INSERT_ON_DELETE = Y.

parameters.name: TRIM_SPACES_FROM_BUSINESS_KEY
parameters.description: Indicates whether spaces are trimmed from the business keys.

parameters.name: FMC_GENERATE_SRC_LOADING_SCRIPTS
parameters.description: Indicates whether scripts are generated for the FMC that load the data from the source to the Data Warehouse INI and CDC tables.

parameters.name: HASHDIFF_NULL_REPLACEMENT
parameters.description: Determines the value that is used to replace null values in the hash difference calculation. (Has to be a single character, since it is used with the trim function.)

parameters.name: FMC_BATCH_SIZE
parameters.description: Determines the number of records that are loaded at the same time by the loading scripts in the FMC. Value depends on the available memory of the FMC workers(this parameter will be saved in a json file to import as an airflow variable and can be adjusted in airflow later).

parameters.name: CREATE_INI_TABLES
parameters.description: Whether or not the CDC and ini tables are created in the DDL scripts.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_PL_PROCEDURES
parameters.description: Schema where the procedures for loading the Presentation Layer(PL) are stored.This parameter supports templating, when creating a project, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the project name.

parameters.name: SOURCE_BV_DEP
parameters.description: Whether the Business Vault Layer(BV) load can only run if the Raw Vault (FL) load for this source was successful or if it is also allowed to run if the load for this source failed.

parameters.name: USE_FMC
parameters.description: Whether or not to use FMC (only available if the FMC is purchased)

parameters.name: FMC_LOADING_HIST_TABLE_NAME
parameters.description: Table that stores the history of all executed loads of the FL with the FMC

parameters.name: FMC_DYNAMIC_LOADING_WINDOW
parameters.description: Whether the begin of the loading window is determined by the end of the last successful run or whether the load will have a static loading window but will wait for the successful execution of the previous run.

parameters.name: CDC_UPDATE_RECORD_ALL_ATTRIBUTES
parameters.description: Indicates whether the CDC system delivers all attributes of an updated record or only the changed attributes.

parameters.name: CDC_PRE_POST_IMAGE_FLAG
parameters.description: This field indicates if the incoming record represents the pre-image or postimage of a new source record.

parameters.name: CDC_PRE_POST_IMAGE_UNIQUE_KEY
parameters.description: This field contains the unique identifier needed to link the pre- and post-image from the CDC-system to each other.

parameters.name: CDC_PRE_IMAGE_FLAG_VALUE
parameters.description: When the CDC_PRE_POST_IMAGE_FLAG attribute contains this value then the record is the pre-image.

parameters.name: CDC_POST_IMAGE_FLAG_VALUE
parameters.description: When the CDC_PRE_POST_IMAGE_FLAG attribute contains this value then the record is the post-image.

parameters.name: CDC_LOGPOSITION_AVAILABLE
parameters.description: Indicates whether log position data is available for the source database system.

parameters.name: CDC_LOGPOSITION
parameters.description: This contains the unique identifier that determines the position of the transaction in the log of the source database.

parameters.name: NO_CHANGE_INDICATION_CHAR
parameters.description: The special value of a string based attribute used by the CDC system to indicate unchanged attributes when there is no pre-image available.

parameters.name: NO_CHANGE_INDICATION_NUMBER
parameters.description: The special value of a number based attribute used by the CDC system to indicate unchanged attributes when there is no pre-image available.

parameters.name: NO_CHANGE_INDICATION_DATE
parameters.description: The special value of a date based attribute used by the CDC system to indicate unchanged attributes when there is no pre-image available.

parameters.name: NO_CHANGE_INDICATION_TIME
parameters.description: The special value of a time based attribute used by the CDC system to indicate unchanged attributes when there is no pre-image available.

parameters.name: NO_CHANGE_INDICATION_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The special value of a timestamp based attribute used by the CDC system to indicate unchanged attributes when there is no pre-image available.

parameters.name: NO_CHANGE_INDICATION_OTHER
parameters.description: The special value of a attribute with a special data type used by the CDC system to indicate unchanged attributes when there is no pre-image available.

parameters.name: CDC_PRE_IMAGE_AVAILABLE
parameters.description: Indicates whether the CDC system also delivers the record before the change. When there is no pre-image available than the CDC-system itself has to indicate the unchanged values by putting a special value inside the attribute. These special values for all data types are configured in the literal values parameters: NO_CHANGE_INDICATION_[DATA_TYPE_GROUP].

parameters.name: SATELLITE_RECORD_TYPE
parameters.description: Determines the value for the RECORD_TYPE attribute to identify satellite records.

parameters.name: TRANSACTION_TYPE_SATELLITE
parameters.description: Determines the value for the transaction type attribute to identify satellite transaction types.

parameters.name: USE_OBJ_SRC_NAME_FOR_INI_CDC_TABLES
parameters.description: Use the original name of the table in the source for the initial and cdc tables.

parameters.name: USE_REMOTE_CDC_DBLINK
parameters.description: Whether to use a database link in the mapping to connect to the remote CDC schema.

parameters.name: CREATE_REMOTE_DELTA_VIEW
parameters.description: Whether to create a loading window table in the source and views on the source cdc tables to filter out the records inside the current loading window. If N then the FMC will filter those records when transferring the data to the DV.

parameters.name: USE_LCI_TIMESTAMP_FOR_INITIAL_LOAD
parameters.description: Use the timestamp of the Load_cycle_info table for the initial load, otherwise the current_timestamp will be used.

parameters.name: AGENT_PATH
parameters.description: The location where the agent resides at the customer.

parameters.name: GENERATE_FOREIGN_KEYS
parameters.description: If set to N then no foreign keys will be generated. This is mainly useful if you are generating for PostgreSQL and are not a superuser (this is the case for many cloud platforms), because then you cannot disable the keys. This does not impact performance!

parameters.name: DELETE_FLAG_POSITIVE_VALUE
parameters.description: The positive value of the column in the SATs used to indicate whether a record was deleted in the source system

parameters.name: DELETE_FLAG_NEGATIVE_VALUE
parameters.description: The negative value of the column in the SATs used to indicate whether a record was deleted in the source system.

parameters.name: HASH_STORE_IN_BINARY
parameters.description: Indicates whether the hashkey and hashdiff fields should be stored in a binary format. This can improve the performance and reduce the storage. If set to N, then they will be stored as hexadecimal character representation.

parameters.name: FMC_OVERLAPPING_LOADING_WINDOWS
parameters.description: Determines whether an overlap will be added to the loading windows in the FMC, the size of the overlap is given by the "window_overlap" parameter in Airflow.

parameters.name: PIT_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the PIT tables.

parameters.name: PIT_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the PIT tables.

parameters.name: SNAPSHOT_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: The name of the column that stores the snapshot date in the PIT tables.

parameters.name: FMC_BV_LOADING_WINDOW_TABLE_NAME
parameters.description: The name of the table containing the BV loading window dates.

parameters.name: STORE_TEMP_IN_STAGING
parameters.description: Indicates whether temporary storage tables should be placed in the Staging layer. If set to N, then they will be stored in the Data Vault Layer.

parameters.name: UPDATE_LOAD_CYCLE_ID_ON_UPDATE_DELETE
parameters.description: In the satellite when a record is updated or deleted and insert_only_logic = N, the load_cycle_id is updated.

parameters.name: BRIDGE_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Bridge tables.

parameters.name: BRIDGE_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Bridge tables.

parameters.name: CAST_SOURCE_ATTRIBUTES
parameters.description: When the data type of source table columns are text fields, castings to the correct data_type will be performed while loading into the data vault. If also data type checks need to be performed, set DATA_QUALITY_BAD to Y

parameters.name: STORE_HUB_HASH_KEYS_IN_LINK_SAT
parameters.description: Store the Hash keys of the hubs in the satellites of links.

parameters.name: INSERT_ON_DELETE
parameters.description: Enabling this will insert a new record in the satellite for deletes instead of updating a delete flag, this is needed for filtering out duplicate deletes in the firewall, since this logic retains the transaction timestamp of the delete.

parameters.name: LNA_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Link Across Source tables.

parameters.name: LNA_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Link Across Source tables.

parameters.name: LAS_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Satellite on Link Across Source tables.

parameters.name: LAS_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Satellite on Link Across Source tables.

parameters.name: LNA_HASH_KEY_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Hash Key columns of the Link Across Source tables.

parameters.name: LNA_HASH_KEY_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Hash Key columns of the Link Across Source tables.

parameters.name: GENERATE_PRIMARY_UNIQUE_KEYS
parameters.description: If set to N then no primary keys, unique keys or indexes will be generated. This is mainly useful if you are generating for Greenplum.

parameters.name: ERROR_CODE
parameters.description: The name of the column which contains the error code

parameters.name: ERR_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Error table prefix

parameters.name: ERR_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Error table suffix

parameters.name: REFERENTIAL_INTEGRITY_VALIDATED
parameters.description: Validate referential integrity of Link records and write these records to an error logging table in case of a violation. Link records will only be loaded once the reference is validated, unless REFERENTIAL_INTEGRITY_FORCE_LINK_LOAD is enabled.

parameters.name: REFERENTIAL_INTEGRITY_FORCE_LINK_LOAD
parameters.description: Forces the load of Link records that violate the referential integrity. The records that have no parent record will get an unknown value. When the reference gets resolved the correct link record will be loaded as an update.

parameters.name: SUBSEQUENCE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Subsequence source attribute prefix for multi-active satellite

parameters.name: SUBSEQUENCE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Subsequence source attribute suffix for multi-active satellite

parameters.name: NHL_HASH_KEY_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Hash Key columns for the Non-Historized Link tables.

parameters.name: NHL_HASH_KEY_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Hash Key columns for the Non-Historized Link tables.

parameters.name: GENERATE_SCHEMA_DEFINITIONS
parameters.description: Generate a DDL script with create schema statements.

parameters.name: USE_IDENTIFIER_PREFIXES
parameters.description: If this parameter = Y, the short name of the sources and the pit names will be added to the full name just behind the tab type prefix, otherwise it will be added just before the tab type suffix.

parameters.name: FMC_TYPE
parameters.description: Defines the type of FMC used, Apache Airflow or Azure Data Factory.

parameters.name: DATA_ORDER
parameters.description: Temporary integer attribute that is used for calculating orders in the templates.

parameters.name: SNAPSHOT_TS
parameters.description: Temporary timestamp attribute in the pit templates to store the SNAPSHOT_TIMESTAMP for seperate Satellites.

parameters.name: MIN_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: Temporary timestamp attribute in the templates to store the minimum for the load timestamp attribute.

parameters.name: MAX_LOAD_TIMESTAMP
parameters.description: Temporary timestamp attribute in the templates to store the maximum for the load timestamp attribute.

parameters.name: ORIGIN_ID
parameters.description: Temporary integer attribute in the templates to store the origin of a record.

parameters.name: END_INTERVAL
parameters.description: Temporary timestamp attribute in the templates to store the end of the interval.

parameters.name: GENERAL_ORDER
parameters.description: Temporary integer attribute in the templates to store the order for data.

parameters.name: ADD_RECORD_SOURCE_ATTRIBUTE
parameters.description: Enabling this will add an extra record source attribute to the hub - link - reference objects.

parameters.name: RECORD_SOURCE
parameters.description: The name of the column that stores the record source in the HUB.

parameters.name: RECORD_SOURCE_VALUE_TEMPLATE
parameters.description:
The template how to store the record source, this can be done by a template or by hardcoding a string.
 The templates should always be lower case like seen in the next list:
 Possible templates for the source: <record_src_name> (default)
 Possible templates for objects: <table_name> or <table_short_name> or <table_abbreviated_name>(default)

parameters.name: FMC_WINDOW_OVERLAP_SIZE
parameters.description: The interval size for the overlap between loading windows, example result: "timestamp_attribute -FMC_WINDOW_OVERLAP_SIZE * interval'1 FMC_WINDOW_OVERLAP_TYPE'". Only used if FMC_OVERLAPPING_LOADING_WINDOWS is Y.

parameters.name: FMC_WINDOW_OVERLAP_TYPE
parameters.description: The interval type for the overlap between loading windows, example result: "timestamp_attribute -FMC_WINDOW_OVERLAP_SIZE * interval'1 FMC_WINDOW_OVERLAP_TYPE'". Only used if FMC_OVERLAPPING_LOADING_WINDOWS is Y.

parameters.name: CREATE_CDC_TABLES
parameters.description: Whether or not the CDC and ini tables are created in the DDL scripts.

parameters.name: SUBSEQUENCE_SEQ
parameters.description: Subsequence column name for multi active satellites without subsequence attributes

parameters.name: AGG_HASH_DIFF
parameters.description: Temporary attribute used to store aggregated hash diff for the multi active satellites without subsequence attributes logic.

parameters.name: COUNT_MULTI_ACTIVE
parameters.description: Temporary attribute used to store the number of records per key for the multi active satellites without subsequence attributes logic.

parameters.name: CAST_BINARY_TO_HEX
parameters.description: When converting a binary value to a string, use the hex approach to have the same result across technologies.

parameters.name: STREAMING_SOURCE
parameters.description: Enables the source data to be streamed to the target using Spark structured streaming instead of using batch loading. This requires the source data to be delivered through Kafka. The source can be either a native Kafka source or incremental data from a different source type (file or Database) being streamed into Kafka e.g. by a CDC system.

parameters.name: WATER_MARK_SIZE
parameters.description: Watermarking is a feature in Spark Structured Streaming that is used to handle the data that arrives late. It will postpone processing of incoming data so that referential integrity issues could be resolved.

parameters.name: ERROR_RECORD_RETENTION_TIME
parameters.description: Error record retention time for Spark structural streaming in seconds. Will be used to persist referential integrity error records.

parameters.name: STREAMING_EXT_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Spark streaming extraction late table prefix. Will be used for resolving referential integrity issues.

parameters.name: STREAMING_EXT_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Spark streaming extraction late table suffix. Will be used for resolving referential integrity issues.

parameters.name: STREAMING_STG_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Spark streaming staging table prefix. Will be used for resolving referential integrity issues.

parameters.name: STREAMING_STG_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Spark streaming staging table suffix. Will be used for resolving referential integrity issues.

parameters.name: OBJECT_SPECIFIC_LOADING_WINDOW
parameters.description: When set to Y, the loading window will be defined separately for each source object instead of having one window per source.

parameters.name: CDC_BASED_LOADING_WINDOW
parameters.description: When set to Y, the FMC will base the end of the loading window on the maximum CDC timestamp in the landing table of a specific object. This means that all new CDC records since the previous load will be ingested each load, provided that they arrive in chronological order.

parameters.name: OBJECT_NAME
parameters.description: The name of the column that stores the source object name in the FMC metadata tables, used with OBJECT_SPECIFIC_LOADING_WINDOW.

parameters.name: FMC_OBJECT_LOADING_HIST_TABLE_NAME
parameters.description: Table that stores the history for a specific object of all executed loads of the FL with the FMC

parameters.name: SCHEMA_INI_R
parameters.description: The name of the remote schema for the initial load tables. This is the schema used to retrieve the initial load data when source loading through the FMC is enabled. This parameter supports templating, when creating a source, the string "PROJECT" will be replaced by the source name. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: SCHEMA_CDC_KAFKA
parameters.description: The name of the schema for the incremental streaming load tables. For Snowflake/Databricks/Microsoft Fabric targets Database\Catalog name can be included into schema definition separating them by dot eg. 'database.schema'.

parameters.name: CDC_SEQUENCE
parameters.description: The name of the column used to store the sequence number of the changes detected in the source system.

parameters.name: FMC_BEGIN_LW_SEQUENCE
parameters.description: The name of the column used to store the begin loading window number for the FMC.

parameters.name: FMC_END_LW_SEQUENCE
parameters.description: The name of the column used to store the end loading window number for the FMC.

parameters.name: FMC_FILE_EXTENSION
parameters.description: Databricks file extension (If the generated mappings are deployed to Databricks directly, then this should be left on the default value(.sql). If the mappings are deployed to GIT and imported into Databricks through the GIT integration, then it should be set to an empty string).

parameters.name: ADD_RECORD_TRACKING_SATELLITE
parameters.description: Adds record tracking satellite

parameters.name: EXISTS_FLAG_POSITIVE_VALUE
parameters.description: Positive value of column in RTSs used to indicate if a records existed in source system

parameters.name: EXISTS_FLAG_NEGATIVE_VALUE
parameters.description: Negative value of column in RTSs used to indicate if a records existed in source system

parameters.name: RTS_TABLE_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Record Tracking Satellite tables

parameters.name: RTS_TABLE_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Record Tracking Satellite tables

parameters.name: EXISTS_FLAG
parameters.description: Exists flag column name for record tracking satellites

parameters.name: SK_SUFFIX
parameters.description: Suffix of the names of the Shard Key constrains of all generated tables.

parameters.name: SK_PREFIX
parameters.description: Prefix of the names of the Shard Key constrains of all generated tables.

parameters.name: STG_TABLE_CURR_PREFIX
parameters.description: This parameter contains the prefix that will be added to the name of the staging table for current dataset storage copy. Specific for Full Load and Full Load using Modification Date/Sequence with Delete Management.

parameters.name: STG_TABLE_CURR_SUFFIX
parameters.description: This parameter contains the suffix that will be added to the name of the staging table for current dataset storage copy. Specific for Full Load and Full Load using Modification Date/Sequence with Delete Management.

parameters.name: STG_TABLE_PREV_PREFIX
parameters.description: This parameter contains the suffix that will be added to the name of the staging table for previous dataset storage copy. Specific for Full Load and Full Load using Modification Date/Sequence with Delete Management.

parameters.name: STG_TABLE_PREV_SUFFIX
parameters.description: This parameter contains the suffix that will be added to the name of the staging table for previous dataset storage copy. Specific for Full Load and Full Load using Modification Date/Sequence with Delete Management.

parameters.name: ADD_NH_COUNTER_RECORD_DELETE
parameters.description: Adds a COUNTER attribute to a non-historic object. It shows whether the record is deleted from a source system or not

parameters.name: NH_COUNTER_POSITIVE_VALUE
parameters.description: Positive value of a column in a non-historic object used to indicate if a record exists in a source system

parameters.name: NH_COUNTER_NEGATIVE_VALUE
parameters.description: Negative value of a column in a non-historic object used to indicate if a record exists in a source system

parameters.name: NH_COUNTER
parameters.description: COUNTER attribute name of a non-historic object

parameters.name: USE_ORIGINAL_SOURCE_TABLE_NAME_FOR_INI_CDC_OBJECTS
parameters.description: When mapping a (dropped) object to a new incoming object, keep using the old source table name instead of the new source table name for CDC and INI objects.

parameters.name: CONVERT_FMC_TIMEZONE
parameters.description: Indicates whether FMC timezone should be converted to the target database timezone.

parameters.name: TARGET_TIMEZONE
parameters.description: The timezone of the target database. It must be in the correct format for your target technology.

parameters.name: FMC_TIMEZONE
parameters.description: The timezone of the FMC server.

parameters.name: CONVERT_SOURCE_TIMEZONE
parameters.description: Indicates whether source timezone is different from the target database timezone. This is used only for source loading window calculation.

parameters.name: SOURCE_TIMEZONE
parameters.description: The timezone of the source.

parameters.name: DETECT_UPDATES_INSERTS_ON_FULL_LOAD
parameters.description: This parameter allows to disable column by column comparison to detect updates on Full Load with Delete Management

parameters.name: CDC_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT_MASK
parameters.description: This parameter allows to define cast format mask separately for cdc timestamp column.

parameters.name: CAST_VS_MANAGED_ATTRIBUTES
parameters.description: This parameter allows to disable cdc_timestamp/cdc_sequence column casting when CAST_SOURCE_ATTRIBUTES = Y

parameters.name: DELTA_GENERATE_INIT_MAPPINGS
parameters.description: Indicates which initial load mappings should be generated in a delta generation: only mappings for new objects, only for changed objects(default), or all mappings(full generation)

parameters.name: DELTA_GENERATE_INCR_MAPPINGS
parameters.description: Indicates which incremental load mappings should be generated in a delta generation: only mappings for new objects, only for changed objects(default), or all mappings(full generation)

parameters.name: MAX_BUSINESS_KEY_LENGTH
parameters.description: Defines maximum length of the concatenated business key. Default value is null (MAX) characters.
